ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the stock belongs to */,
  "earnings_expectation" TEXT /* Earnings expectation for the stock (e.g., Increase, Decrease) */,
  "irv_status" TEXT /* Intrinsic Value (IRV) status (e.g., Above Fair Price, Below Fair Price) */,
  "capm_status" TEXT /* Capital Asset Pricing Model (CAPM) status (e.g., UnderValued, Fairly Valued) */,
  "esg_status" TEXT /* ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) status (e.g., Sustainable, Average) */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the stock */,
  "annu_return_10y" REAL /* Annualized return over the last 10 years */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "eps_ttm" REAL /* Earnings per share (trailing twelve months) */,
  "growth_estimate_5y" REAL /* 5-year growth estimate */,
  "pe_forward" REAL /* Forward price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "pe_trailing" REAL /* Trailing price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "irv_fair_value" REAL /* Intrinsic Value (IRV) fair value */,
  "esg_risk" REAL /* ESG risk score */,
  "capm_expected_return" REAL /* Expected return based on CAPM */,
  "ahv_5y" REAL /* 5-year average high value */,
  "annu_return_5y" REAL /* Annualized return over the last 5 years */,
  "sharpe" REAL /* Sharpe ratio */,
  "stock_exchange" TEXT /* The stock exchange on which the stock is listed (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry to which the company belongs */,
  "ipo_year" INTEGER /* The year the company went public */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* The ratio of the annual dividend payment per share to the stock's current price */,
  "short_interest" INTEGER /* The number of shares currently shorted */,
  "short_interest_ratio" REAL /* The ratio of short interest to the average daily trading volume */,
  "institutional_ownership" REAL /* The percentage of outstanding shares held by institutional investors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "sector_code" TEXT /* A standardized code for the sector (e.g., XLC for Communication Services) */,
  "sector_description_long" TEXT /* A longer description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* The user's password (hashed for security) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The user's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* The user's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was last updated */,
  "portfolio_type" TEXT /* The type of portfolio (e.g., retirement, growth, income) */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* The user's risk tolerance level (e.g., conservative, moderate, aggressive) */,
  "investment_goal" TEXT /* The user's investment goal (e.g., long-term growth, income generation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "target_allocation" REAL /* The target allocation of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "current_allocation" REAL /* The current allocation of the stock in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
